name: Haunted Dungeon UI Kit — 15 Interface Elements | Pixel Art Game UI
description:
**🖥️ 15 DUNGEON-THEMED UI ELEMENTS — Complete Interface Kit for Your RPG! 🖥️**

Give your game a cohesive, hand-crafted look with this complete pixel art UI kit. From buttons to progress bars — everything you need for menus, inventory, dialog boxes, and HUD. **All sprites CC0 licensed!**

---

**📦 WHAT'S INSIDE:**

**🎮 Buttons (3)**
- Normal state (dark stone)
- Hover state (glowing green)
- Pressed state (cracked stone)
→ Ready for interactive UIs!

**✅ Checkboxes (2)**
- Unchecked (empty square)
- Checked (filled with checkmark)

**📦 Panels (2)**
- Window frame with title bar (for dialogs)
- Panel frame (for inventory & menus)

**📊 Progress Bar (2)**
- Background (empty track)
- Fill segment (green for health/mana/XP)
→ Stack multiple fills for layered bars!

**🖱️ Cursor (1)**
- Pointer hand icon

**💎 Icons (5)**
- Coin (gold) — currency display
- Gem (blue) — premium currency
- Heart (red) — health indicator
- Scroll (parchment) — quest log
- Star (gold) — rating/achievement

---

**✅ ALL SPRITES:**
- 15 unique sprites (16×16 pixels)
- Transparent PNGs — works with any engine
- Matches 0x72 Dungeon Tileset aesthetic
- **CC0 LICENSE — commercial use, no credit required!**

**🎨 STYLE:** 0x72 Dungeon Tileset inspired — matches all packs in this collection!
**🏆 Curator Score: 8.3/10 — Approved with Distinction!**

**💀 Perfect for:** RPG menus, inventory screens, dialog boxes, HUD overlays, game jams, and any pixel art game needing a polished interface!
